sessions.summary: Bug fix + feature session — explode fix (world-space direction), DracoLoader for compressed GLB, large-file FileReader progress, analysis panel maximize/focus expand buttons, PDF print export.
Major fix session — upload (IndexedDB + toB64 fix), render from vault (readBinaryEncrypted), 2D viewer (images/SVG/PDF), analysis refinement chat panel, 3MF/AMF loaders, lwo/x3d to fallback.
Debugging session — single-key PAT design, Three.js importmap fix, boot null crashes, Groq key modal, LWOLoader/X3DLoader removal, PAT redaction.

Project inception — full architecture discussion, all decisions locked. Repo: PandaDesign-in/bot. App: PandaAI. Stack: vanilla JS, no npm, GitHub backend, AES-256-GCM, Groq 8B/70B/Whisper, Three.js viewer, all CAD formats.
sessions.note: Plaintext — encryption module not yet built. Encrypt from session 002 onwards.
